articles.title: About Me
articles.description: Yujing Gao, a journalist from Mainland China, writes financial coverage with focus on the health industry and hosted a live-streaming channel called Face the Doctor.

articles.title: Influence of my coverage
articles.description: Aim to bridge information gap and promote social justice through news coverage.
articles.contents:
Award
Removing Import Tariffs on Anti-cancer Drugs to Benefit
Patients’ Livelihood was awarded for great coverage
composition on Healthy China in 2018 from the National Health Commission
of the PRC.



Assisting Supervision
by Public Opinion
Kangmei Pharmaceutical Founder Denies the Allegation of
Financial Fraud after 29.9 Billion Yuan Cash Disappearing
was cited in a regulatory work letter by Shanghai Stock Exchange,and the
Vtopic on Weibo generated from the coverage attracted millions of
reads.



Click
here to read original regulatory work letter

here to read original vtopic website
